section_title: Power to hold investigation or preliminary inquiry
chapter_title: Chapter: 12 – Information To The Police And Their Powers To Investigate
text: Such Magistrate, on receiving such report, may direct an investigation, or, if he thinks fit, at once proceed, or depute any Magistrate subordinate to him to proceed, to hold a preliminary inquiry into, or otherwise to dispose of, the case in the manner provided in this Code.
